subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God and His chosen ones! I have taken up the pen to write what stirs within my heart and soul with love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احباء الله و اصفیائه قد اخذت القلم لاکتب ما یختلج فی قلبی و فوادی حبا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @poems and quotation from poetry
